title: Annoyance Be Gone
description: Makes those annoying mob and Redstone sounds go away!
body: Ever grown sick of your mob farm constantly **MOOOOOOOO**ing at you or **BAAAAAAAAAA**ing at you while you try fashionscape up your base? Or sick of those click-click-clickity-click dispensers? Well, fear no more! Annoyance Be Gone saves you from this (_and your ears!_), This simply mutes them away no longer do you have to fiddle with your sound settings to get rid of their audio, They are straight and simply muted out of existence. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### Sounds that are disabled - Cows - Chickens - Sheep - Pigs - Villagers - Dispensers - Droppers - Minecarts -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### Incompatibilities - None! - As long as the resource pack is at the top of your resourcepacks list it will override any other sounds from the ones below it!
